text.title: knowledge-areas-detail Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for knowledge-areas-detail as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: LLMs default to KA-5 (modelling) on any input.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Most real project failures are in KA-1 (no stakeholder map) or KA-3 (no traceability). Make the planner explicitly score all 6 KAs before dispatching.
